# HMS OpenUI5/OData V4 - AI Coding Assistant Guide

**Project**: Hospital Management System (HMS) — OpenUI5 + OData V4 Edition
**Generated By**: ERDwithAI v5.1.0
**Architecture**: Enterprise SAP-Style (OpenUI5 FCL + OData V4 + Compiere Application Dictionary)
**Location**: `generated-projects/hms-openui5-odatav4/`

---

## Quick Reference

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `npm run dev` | Start backend + frontend concurrently |
| `npm run dev:backend` | OData V4 server only (http://localhost:3000) |
| `npm run dev:frontend` | OpenUI5 app only (http://localhost:3001) |
| `npm run build` | Build backend (tsc) + frontend (ui5 build) |
| `npm run db:migrate` | Run Knex database migrations |
| `npm run db:seed` | Seed sys_reference, sys_table, sys_column, sys_field data |
| `npm run lint` | Run ui5lint + eslint on frontend |
| `npm run test:opa5` | Run OPA5 integration tests (Karma) |
| `npm run test:opa5:ci` | OPA5 tests in headless CI mode |
| `npm run test:e2e` | Run Playwright E2E tests |
| `npm run test:opa5:browser` | Run OPA5 tests via browser runner |

---

## Project Overview

The HMS OpenUI5/OData V4 project is a fully-functional hospital management system generated from a Mermaid ERD definition. It implements the **Compiere Application Dictionary** pattern: all UI layout, field ordering, and display logic is controlled at runtime through metadata stored in `sys_*` tables, not hardcoded in views.

### Key Concepts

- **Application Dictionary**: `sys_*` tables store metadata that drives UI rendering at runtime
- **Business Data**: `bus_*` tables hold the actual hospital domain data
- **Runtime Configuration**: Field order (`seq_no`), visibility, and display properties can be changed by an admin without redeployment
- **OData V4 Protocol**: All data access uses standard OData V4 `$filter`, `$orderby`, `$top`, `$skip`, `$expand`, and `$batch`
- **Flexible Column Layout (FCL)**: OpenUI5 3-column navigation (entity menu → list → detail)

### Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology | Version |
|-------|------------|---------|
| Frontend Framework | OpenUI5 (sap.m, sap.f FCL, sap.uxap) | 1.145+ |
| Frontend Build | @ui5/cli tooling | 3.x |
| Backend Protocol | OData V4 (odata-v4-server / jaystack) | 0.2.x |
| Backend Runtime | Node.js / Express | 18+ |
| Database ORM | Knex.js | 3.x |
| Database | PostgreSQL 14+ (SQLite for dev) | — |
| UI Lint | @ui5/linter | 1.x |
| Testing | OPA5 (Karma), Playwright | — |
| Transpilation | TypeScript (backend only) | 5.3+ |

## Application Dictionary (Compiere Pattern)

The Application Dictionary is the core architectural concept. Instead of hardcoding UI layout in views, all metadata is stored in `sys_*` tables and loaded at runtime via OData.

### sys_ Table Hierarchy

```
sys_reference          ← Data type definitions (22 standard types)
    └── sys_ref_list   ← List values for LIST reference type
    └── sys_ref_table  ← Table lookup config for TABLE reference type

sys_table              ← Physical table metadata (name, access level, icon)
    └── sys_column     ← Column metadata (type, mandatory, validation)
        └── sys_val_rule ← Validation rules (SQL/List/Range expressions)

sys_window             ← UI window definition (Maintain/Transaction/Query)
    └── sys_tab        ← Tab within window (master-detail hierarchy via tab_level)
        └── sys_field  ← Field layout per tab (seq_no controls runtime order!)
            └── sys_field_group ← Visual grouping (Collapsible/Label/Tab types)

sys_user               ← User accounts
sys_role               ← Role definitions (RBAC)
sys_user_roles         ← User ↔ Role assignments
sys_access             ← Role → Window/Table access grants
```

### Reference Types (sys_reference)

| ID | Name | UI Widget | SQL Type |
|----|------|-----------|----------|
| 10 | STRING | Input | VARCHAR |
| 11 | INTEGER | StepInput | INTEGER |
| 12 | AMOUNT | Input (number) | DECIMAL |
| 13 | ID | Hidden | UUID / SERIAL |
| 14 | TEXT | TextArea | TEXT |
| 15 | DATE | DatePicker | DATE |
| 16 | DATETIME | DateTimePicker | TIMESTAMP |
| 17 | LIST | Select / ComboBox | VARCHAR (from sys_ref_list) |
| 18 | TABLE | Select (OData lookup) | UUID FK |
| 19 | TABLE_DIRECT | Select (direct FK) | UUID FK |
| 20 | YES_NO | CheckBox | BOOLEAN |
| 21 | LOCATION | Input (address) | TEXT |
| 22 | LOCATOR | Input | VARCHAR |
| 23 | ACCOUNT | Input | VARCHAR |
| 24 | URL | Link / Input | VARCHAR |
| 25 | IMAGE | Avatar / Image | VARCHAR (URL) |
| 26 | FILE | UploadCollection | VARCHAR (path) |
| 27 | COLOR | ColorPicker | VARCHAR |
| 28 | JSON | CodeEditor | TEXT |
| 29 | PASSWORD | Input (password) | VARCHAR (hashed) |
| 30 | EMAIL | Input (email) | VARCHAR |
| 31 | PHONE | Input (tel) | VARCHAR |

### Access Levels (sys_table.access_level)

| Code | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| S | System — only system admin can modify |
| C | Client — tenant-level data |
| O | Organization — org-level data |
| CO | Client + Organization |
| A | All — no restrictions |

### Window Types (sys_window.window_type)

| Code | Meaning | Use Case |
|------|---------|----------|
| M | Maintain | Master data (patients, staff, departments) |
| T | Transaction | Documents (appointments, admissions, bills) |
| Q | Query | Reporting / read-only analysis |

### Runtime Field Ordering — The Key Feature

`sys_field.seq_no` controls field order in detail forms. `sys_field.seq_no_grid` controls column order in list tables. Both can be changed at runtime through the Admin interface (`#/admin`) without code changes or redeployment.

```
Admin UI → PATCH /odata/SysFields(id) { seq_no: newOrder }
         → OpenUI5 list re-renders with new field positions
```

---

## Business Entities (bus_ Tables)

The HMS includes 13 domain entities, all prefixed `bus_`:

| Entity | Table | Window Type | Key Relations |
|--------|-------|-------------|---------------|
| Patient | bus_patient | Maintain (M) | Root entity |
| Staff | bus_staff | Maintain (M) | Department FK |
| Department | bus_department | Maintain (M) | Root entity |
| Appointment | bus_appointment | Transaction (T) | Patient, Doctor (Staff) |
| Admission | bus_admission | Transaction (T) | Patient, Department |
| Encounter | bus_encounter | Transaction (T) | Patient, Staff |
| Diagnosis | bus_diagnosis | Transaction (T) | Encounter FK |
| Prescription | bus_prescription | Transaction (T) | Encounter FK |
| LabOrder | bus_lab_order | Transaction (T) | Encounter FK |
| LabResult | bus_lab_result | Transaction (T) | LabOrder FK |
| VitalSign | bus_vital_sign | Transaction (T) | Encounter FK |
| Bill | bus_bill | Transaction (T) | Patient, Admission |
| InsuranceProvider | bus_insurance_provider | Maintain (M) | Root entity |

---

## Backend — OData V4 Server

### Architecture

```
Express app
  ├── /odata/*              ← OData V4 service (jaystack odata-v4-server)
  │     ├── $metadata       ← EDM model auto-generated from odata.config.ts
  │     ├── Patients        ← Entity sets (one per bus_ table)
  │     ├── SysFields       ← sys_field entity set (for admin UI)
  │     ├── SysTables       ← sys_table entity set
  │     └── $batch          ← OData batch endpoint
  ├── /health               ← Health check
  └── Middleware: cors, helmet, compression
```

### Key Backend Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/server.ts` | Express setup, OData V4 registration, port 3000 |
| `src/config/odata.config.ts` | EDM model (entity types, entity sets, navigation properties) |
| `src/controllers/base.controller.ts` | Generic CRUD: `query()`, `getById()`, `create()`, `update()`, `delete()` |
| `src/controllers/bus/bus-patient.controller.ts` | Example entity controller extending BaseController |
| `src/controllers/sys/sys-field.controller.ts` | sys_field CRUD (used by Admin UI for field reordering) |
| `src/utils/odata-filter.ts` | Parses OData `$filter` expressions → Knex `.where()` clauses |
| `src/utils/dynamic-schema.ts` | Resolves column types from sys_column at runtime |
| `src/database/connection.ts` | Knex connection pool with environment-based config |

### OData V4 Supported Query Options

```
GET /odata/Patients?$filter=last_name eq 'Smith'&$top=20&$skip=0&$orderby=created_at desc
GET /odata/Patients(uuid)
GET /odata/Patients?$expand=Appointments
POST /odata/Patients          { body: patient JSON }
PATCH /odata/Patients(uuid)   { body: partial patient JSON }
DELETE /odata/Patients(uuid)
GET /odata/$metadata          (EDM model)
POST /odata/$batch            (multiple operations)
```

### OData $filter Operators

| Operator | Example | SQL Equivalent |
|----------|---------|----------------|
| `eq` | `status eq 'active'` | `status = 'active'` |
| `ne` | `age ne 0` | `age != 0` |
| `gt` / `ge` | `age gt 18` | `age > 18` |
| `lt` / `le` | `age lt 65` | `age < 65` |
| `contains` | `contains(name,'Smith')` | `name LIKE '%Smith%'` |
| `startswith` | `startswith(name,'Jo')` | `name LIKE 'Jo%'` |
| `and` / `or` | `a eq 1 and b eq 2` | `a=1 AND b=2` |

### ETag Concurrency

All entity sets support ETag-based optimistic locking:
- `GET` responses include `ETag` header (hash of `updated_at`)
- `PATCH`/`DELETE` must send `If-Match: <etag>` header
- Mismatched ETags return `412 Precondition Failed`

### Database Migrations

```bash
cd backend
npm run migrate           # Apply all pending migrations (Knex)
npm run migrate:rollback  # Roll back last batch
npm run seed              # Run all seed files
```

Migration files (in `backend/migrations/`):

| File | Creates |
|------|---------|
| `001_create_bus_tables.ts` | All `bus_*` tables (patients, staff, appointments, etc.) |
| `002_seed_large_dataset.ts` | Sample hospital data for development |

The `sys_*` tables are created by the common migration in the generator's `common/migrations/` templates and must be migrated separately if not already present.

### Backend Environment Variables

| Variable | Required | Default | Purpose |
|----------|----------|---------|---------|
| `DATABASE_URL` | Yes | — | PostgreSQL connection string |
| `PORT` | No | 3000 | OData server port |
| `NODE_ENV` | No | development | `development` / `production` |
| `CORS_ORIGIN` | No | `*` | Allowed frontend origin |

```bash
# backend/.env example
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/hms_db
PORT=3000
NODE_ENV=development
CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3001
```

---

## Frontend — OpenUI5

### Architecture

```
OpenUI5 FCL (Flexible Column Layout)
  ├── Column 1: Master (EntityMenu) — sidebar entity selector
  ├── Column 2: Mid (List)         — data table with search
  └── Column 3: End (Detail)       — single record form

Navigation Pattern:
  EntityMenu → List → Detail (3-column)
                    → Create (replaces Detail column)
  Admin       → Field reorder interface
```

### Routing (Component.js)

| Route | Pattern | View | Description |
|-------|---------|------|-------------|
| entityMenu | `` (empty) | EntityMenu | Default: entity selector |
| list | `{entity}` | `entity/Bus{Entity}List` | Entity list table |
| detail | `{entity}/{id}` | `entity/Bus{Entity}Detail` | Single record |
| create | `{entity}/create` | `entity/Bus{Entity}Create` | New record form |
| admin | `admin` | Admin | Field layout configuration |
| notFound | any | NotFound | 404 page |

### Controller Responsibilities

| Controller | File | Responsibility |
|-----------|------|---------------|
| App | `App.controller.js` | ShellBar, SideNavigation, global error handler |
| EntityMenu | `EntityMenu.controller.js` | Entity list from sys_table, navigate to list |
| Master | `Master.controller.js` | FCL column management, layout switching |
| List (generic) | `List.controller.js` | OData binding, pagination, search, delete |
| Detail (generic) | `Detail.controller.js` | Record load, edit mode, save (PATCH), ETag |
| Create (generic) | `Create.controller.js` | Form build from sys_field metadata, POST |
| Admin | `Admin.controller.js` | Load sys_field, drag-drop reorder, PATCH seq_no |
| Bus*List | `entity/Bus*List.controller.js` | Entity-specific filters and column config |
| Bus*Detail | `entity/Bus*Detail.controller.js` | Entity-specific field rendering |
| Bus*Create | `entity/Bus*Create.controller.js` | Entity-specific form validation |

### OData Binding in Views

```xml
<!-- List view: OData binding with $filter and $orderby -->
<Table
  items="{
    path: '/Patients',
    parameters: {
      $top: 20,
      $skip: 0,
      $orderby: 'created_at desc'
    }
  }">

<!-- Detail view: Single entity binding -->
<ObjectPage
  binding="{/Patients('{id}')}">

<!-- Lookup field: TABLE reference type -->
<Select
  selectedKey="{department_id}"
  items="{
    path: '/Departments',
    template: <core:Item key='{bus_department_id}' text='{name}'/>
  }"/>
```

### Metadata-Driven Form Rendering

Detail and Create views load field metadata from `sys_field` and render controls dynamically:

```javascript
// In Detail/Create controllers — load field metadata
this._oModel.read("/SysFields", {
  filters: [new Filter("sys_tab_id", FilterOperator.EQ, tabId)],
  sorters: [new Sorter("seq_no", false)],   // seq_no controls order!
  success: (data) => {
    data.results.forEach(field => {
      const control = this._createControl(field.sys_reference_id);
      this.byId("formContainer").addContent(control);
    });
  }
});
```

### i18n Labels

All UI text goes through `i18n/i18n.properties`. Entity labels follow:

```properties
# Entity titles
entity.patient=Patient
entity.staff=Staff
entity.appointment=Appointment
entity.admission=Admission

# Field labels
field.patient_id=Patient ID
field.first_name=First Name
field.date_of_birth=Date of Birth
field.blood_type=Blood Type

# Actions
action.create=Create
action.save=Save
action.delete=Delete
action.cancel=Cancel
action.search=Search

# Messages
msg.deleteConfirm=Are you sure you want to delete this record?
msg.saveSuccess=Record saved successfully.
msg.saveError=Failed to save record.
```

### Linting

```bash
cd frontend

# UI5 lint (no deprecated API, proper module patterns, XML validation)
npx ui5lint

# ESLint (JS code style, no globals, proper async)
npx eslint webapp --ext .js,.xml

# Both together (from root)
npm run lint
```

## Testing

### OPA5 Integration Tests

OPA5 tests run in-browser against the live OData backend. Tests are located in `frontend/webapp/test/integration/`.

```bash
# From project root — starts Karma and runs OPA5 tests
npm run test:opa5

# Headless CI mode
npm run test:opa5:ci

# Browser runner (uses opa5.conf.json)
npm run test:opa5:browser
```

#### Test Coverage

| Test Suite | File | Scenarios |
|-----------|------|-----------|
| Navigation | `NavigationTests.opa5.js` | FCL column transitions, entity navigation, breadcrumbs |
| CRUD | `CRUDTests.opa5.js` | Create record, read list, update field, delete with confirm |
| All | `AllTests.js` | Entry point that runs all suites |

#### OPA5 Test Pattern

```javascript
// Navigation test example
opaTest("Navigate from entity menu to patient list", function(Given, When, Then) {
  Given.iStartMyApp();
  When.onEntityMenu.iPressEntityLink("Patients");
  Then.onPatientList.iShouldSeeThePatientList();
  Then.iTeardownMyApp();
});

// CRUD test example
opaTest("Create a new patient record", function(Given, When, Then) {
  Given.iStartMyApp();
  When.onEntityMenu.iPressEntityLink("Patients");
  When.onPatientList.iPressCreateButton();
  When.onPatientCreate.iFillForm({ first_name: "John", last_name: "Doe" });
  When.onPatientCreate.iPressSave();
  Then.onPatientList.iShouldSeeRecord("John Doe");
  Then.iTeardownMyApp();
});
```

### Playwright E2E Tests

Playwright tests run against the full deployed application.

```bash
# From project root
npm run test:e2e          # Headless
npm run test:e2e:ui       # With browser UI
npm run test:e2e:debug    # Debug mode (step through)

# Install browser binaries (first time)
npm run install:playwright
```

---

## Admin Interface — Runtime Field Configuration

### Accessing Admin

Navigate to `#/admin` in the OpenUI5 app (or press "Admin" in the side navigation).

### Field Reordering Workflow

1. Open Admin view (`#/admin`)
2. Select an entity from the dropdown (loads `sys_table` list via OData)
3. The field list loads from `SysFields` ordered by `seq_no`
4. Drag fields to new positions
5. On drop, `PATCH /odata/SysFields(id) { seq_no: newValue }` is sent
6. Other entity views immediately reflect the new ordering on next load

### Admin API Calls

```
GET  /odata/SysTables                          → Entity list for dropdown
GET  /odata/SysFields?$filter=sys_tab_id eq '{id}'&$orderby=seq_no asc
PATCH /odata/SysFields('{fieldId}')  { seq_no: 30, seq_no_grid: 3 }
```

---

## Development Workflow

### Starting Development

```bash
# 1. Install dependencies
npm install          # root workspace installs both backend + frontend

# 2. Configure environment
cp backend/.env.example backend/.env
# Edit backend/.env: set DATABASE_URL

# 3. Set up database
npm run db:migrate   # Creates bus_* tables
npm run db:seed      # Seeds sys_reference, sys_table, sys_column, sys_field, sample data

# 4. Start development servers
npm run dev          # Starts backend (port 3000) + frontend (port 3001) concurrently
```

### Backend Development

```bash
cd backend
npm run start:dev    # ts-node-dev with hot reload
```

Backend auto-reloads on TypeScript file changes (via ts-node-dev `--respawn`).

### Frontend Development

```bash
cd frontend
npm run dev          # ui5 serve with proxy to backend
```

The `ui5-local.yaml` proxy routes `/odata/*` requests to `http://localhost:3000/odata/*` during development so no CORS configuration is needed.

### Adding a New Entity

1. **Database**: Create migration in `backend/migrations/` for the new `bus_*` table
2. **Backend Controller**: Create `backend/src/controllers/bus/bus-{entity}.controller.ts` extending `BaseController`
3. **OData Config**: Register the new entity set in `backend/src/config/odata.config.ts`
4. **Frontend Controllers**: Create `Bus{Entity}List`, `Bus{Entity}Detail`, `Bus{Entity}Create` controllers in `frontend/webapp/controller/entity/`
5. **Frontend Views**: Create corresponding XML views in `frontend/webapp/view/entity/`
6. **Routing**: Add routes in `frontend/webapp/Component.js`
7. **i18n**: Add labels in `frontend/webapp/i18n/i18n.properties`
8. **Dictionary Seed**: Insert `sys_table`, `sys_column`, `sys_window`, `sys_tab`, `sys_field` records for the new entity

### Modifying Field Layout

- **Programmatic**: Update `seq_no` values in the seed file and re-run `npm run db:seed`
- **Runtime (preferred)**: Use the Admin UI at `#/admin` to drag-drop fields without any code changes

---

## Key Files Reference

### Backend

| File | Line Count | Description |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| `backend/src/server.ts` | ~100 | Express app, OData registration, CORS, health check |
| `backend/src/config/odata.config.ts` | ~300 | Full EDM model: all entity types + navigation |
| `backend/src/controllers/base.controller.ts` | ~200 | Generic CRUD with OData $filter, ETag, pagination |
| `backend/src/utils/odata-filter.ts` | ~150 | `$filter` parser (eq, ne, gt, lt, contains, and, or) |
| `backend/src/utils/dynamic-schema.ts` | ~80 | Column type resolution from sys_column at runtime |

### Frontend

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `frontend/webapp/Component.js` | Router manifest, model definitions, OData model setup |
| `frontend/webapp/controller/App.controller.js` | Shell, navigation, error toasts |
| `frontend/webapp/controller/Admin.controller.js` | Field metadata editor, drag-drop, seq_no PATCH |
| `frontend/webapp/controller/List.controller.js` | Table binding, search, pagination, delete |
| `frontend/webapp/controller/Detail.controller.js` | Form load, edit/display toggle, save, ETag |
| `frontend/webapp/controller/Create.controller.js` | Form build from metadata, validation, POST |
| `frontend/webapp/i18n/i18n.properties` | All UI labels (entities, fields, actions, messages) |
| `frontend/webapp/view/App.view.xml` | ShellBar + FCL root container |
| `frontend/webapp/view/Admin.view.xml` | Field list with DnD (sap.m.List + DragDropInfo) |

---

## Common Patterns

### OData Model in Component.js

```javascript
// Main OData V4 model
var oModel = new ODataModel({
  serviceUrl: "/odata/",
  synchronizationMode: "None",
  operationMode: "Server",
  autoExpandSelect: true
});
this.setModel(oModel);
```

### Reading sys_field Metadata in a Controller

```javascript
var oModel = this.getView().getModel();
oModel.bindList("/SysFields", undefined, [
  new Sorter("seq_no", false)  // ascending by seq_no
], [
  new Filter("sys_tab_id", FilterOperator.EQ, sTabId),
  new Filter("is_displayed", FilterOperator.EQ, true)
]).requestContexts().then(function(aContexts) {
  var aFields = aContexts.map(ctx => ctx.getObject());
  // render form controls based on aFields
});
```

### PATCH with ETag

```javascript
var oContext = oTable.getSelectedItem().getBindingContext();
oContext.setProperty("seq_no", iNewSeqNo);
oModel.submitBatch("updateGroup").then(function() {
  MessageToast.show(oBundle.getText("msg.saveSuccess"));
});
```

### OData $filter Construction

```javascript
var aFilters = [];
if (sSearch) {
  aFilters.push(new Filter({
    filters: [
      new Filter("first_name", FilterOperator.Contains, sSearch),
      new Filter("last_name", FilterOperator.Contains, sSearch)
    ],
    and: false  // OR logic
  }));
}
oBinding.filter(aFilters);
```

---

## Troubleshooting

### Backend won't start
```bash
# Check DATABASE_URL is set and database is reachable
cd backend && node -e "require('dotenv').config(); console.log(process.env.DATABASE_URL)"

# Run migrations if tables are missing
npm run db:migrate
```

### Frontend shows "No data" / OData 404
```bash
# Verify backend is running on port 3000
curl http://localhost:3000/odata/$metadata

# Check ui5-local.yaml proxy target matches backend port
cat frontend/ui5-local.yaml
```

### OPA5 tests fail
```bash
# Ensure backend is running before tests
npm run dev:backend &
sleep 3
npm run test:opa5

# For Chrome not found errors
npx playwright install chromium
```

### TypeScript errors in backend
```bash
cd backend
npx tsc --noEmit    # Show all type errors without building
```

### UI5 lint errors
```bash
cd frontend
npx ui5lint         # Shows deprecated API usage and XML validation issues
```

---

## Architecture Comparison: OpenUI5/OData V4 vs Next.js/NestJS

| Concern | OpenUI5/OData V4 (this project) | Next.js/NestJS |
|---------|--------------------------------|----------------|
| Frontend | XML views + JS controllers | React components + TSX |
| API protocol | OData V4 standard | REST (custom endpoints) |
| UI configuration | Runtime via sys_field.seq_no | Runtime via TanStack Table |
| Navigation | FCL 3-column layout | Dashboard + per-entity routes |
| Field reordering | Admin drag-drop → OData PATCH | Admin drag-drop → REST PATCH |
| Search | OData `$filter` + `$search` | Custom search endpoints |
| Testing | OPA5 (integration) | Playwright E2E |
| Backend language | TypeScript (transpiled) | TypeScript (Bun native) |
| ORM | Knex.js | Knex.js |
| Lint | ui5lint + eslint | eslint + tsc |
| Target audience | SAP/enterprise developers | Modern web developers |

---

**Generated By**: ERDwithAI v5.1.0
**Architecture**: OpenUI5/OData V4 + Compiere Application Dictionary
**Last Updated**: March 2026
